zh.title:
> search("你是专业的数字货币交易分析师。请对 雪崩币/美元(AVAX/USD) 进行技术分析。

当前市场数据：
- 最新价格: 9.0564
- 24小时变化: -0.19%
- 高点/低点: 9.0945 / 9.0564
- RSI(14): N/A
- MACD: -0.062146664, Signal: N/A
- SMA(20): 9.16118

要求：
1. 第一行：完整的中文标题，格式："雪崩币/美元技术分析：[趋势描述]"
2. 然后空一行
3. 正文3-4段，每段60-80字，总共250-300字
4. 包含：趋势判断、技术指标解读、支撑/阻力位、交易建议
5. 使用专业术语但易于理解
6. 不要添加任何标签或额外说明

立即开始（第一行就是标题）：")
zh.content:
雪崩币/美元技术分析：短线承压整理震荡偏弱

当前价格略低于20日均线，表明短期多头力度不足，价格围绕均线附近震荡。虽然24小时跌幅不大，但整体走势仍偏弱，尚未确认有效反转，市场情绪谨慎。

MACD为负值，显示下行动能存在，但因信号线数据缺失，无法完全确认背离结构。若后续快线下穿信号线，则可能加剧下跌压力；反之若形成金叉，则有望吸引空头回补。

近期支撑位关注8.80附近整数关口及前低位置，其失守或引发进一步回落。阻力位在9.16均线及9.30心理区域，若价格突破则短线偏多信号加强。

交易上建议等待明确方向，日内可在支撑区尝试低多，止损设在8.70下方。若上破9.30且量能放大，则可考虑趋势跟进多单，否则在阻力附近保持观望或轻仓调整。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
> search("You are a professional cryptocurrency analyst. Provide technical analysis for Avalanche vs US Dollar (AVAX/USD).\n\nCurrent Market Data:\n- Latest Price: 9.0564\n- 24h Change: -0.19%\n- High/Low: 9.0945 / 9.0564\n- RSI(14): N/A\n- MACD: -0.062146664, Signal: N/A\n- SMA(20): 9.16118\n\nRequirements:\n1. Write 3-4 paragraphs, 60-80 words each, total 250-300 words\n2. Include: trend analysis, indicator interpretation, support/resistance levels, trading suggestions\n3. Use professional but accessible language\n4. No labels, no meta-commentary\n5. Start immediately with the content (no title needed)\n\nBegin:")

Avalanche’s short‑term trend around **$9.0564** remains mildly bearish to neutral. The price is trading below the **20‑period simple moving average (SMA)** at ~9.16, suggesting recent downward pressure. Broader market momentum has lacked strength as the MACD is negative, which points to weak bullish conviction in the near term. Without a confirmed RSI reading, traders should watch for momentum confirmations when that data updates. 

Key[Avalanche (AVAX) Price Prediction 2026, 2027-2030 | CoinCodex](https://coincodex.com/crypto/avalanche/price-prediction/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)** · *coincodex.com*
> Based on today's classical pivot point (P1) with the value of $ 14.19 , Avalanche has support levels of $ 13.94 , $ 13.65 , and the strongest at $ 13.40 .


Key **support levels** to monitor include near **$8.85–$8.53**, which historically provided buyers with demand zones. Failure to hold these levels could open the door for deeper retracements toward the next stronger floors. On the upside, initial **resistance near $9.16–$9.27** and then **$9.47** could cap rallies if selling pressure persists. A sustainable break above these resistances would be necessary to shift the near‑term technical bias more bullish. 

Indicator (AVAX) Price Prediction 2026, 2027-2030 | CoinCodex](https://coincodex.com/crypto/avalanche/price-prediction/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)** · *CoinCodex*
> Based on today's classical pivot point (P1) with the value of $ 14.19 , Avalanche has support levels of $ 13.94 , $ 13.65 , and the strongest at $ 13.40 .


Indicator interpretation shows cautious conditions. The negative MACD reading indicates that downward momentum still has some influence, though it isn’t extreme. Historically, bearish MACD can delay upside moves until clear trend reversals form. When the SMA and MACD align with other oscillators like RSI once available, traders will have a clearer picture of strength or exhaustion. For now, range‑bound behavior between support and resistance reinforces consolidation. 

For **trading suggestions**, consider range‑focused30 | CoinCodex](https://coincodex.com/crypto/avalanche/price-prediction/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)** · *CoinCodex*
> Based on today's classical pivot point (P1) with the value of $ 14.19 , Avalanche has support levels of $ 13.94 , $ 13.65 , and the strongest at $ 13.40 .


For **trading suggestions**, consider range‑focused strategies while AVAX trades sideways. Buying nearer strong support with tight stops could offer asymmetric risk, while taking profits or trimming longs near resistance levels ahead of potential rejections makes sense. Aggressive breakout traders might wait for a close above **$9.47** before scaling long, whereas breakdown traders could eye shorts under **$8.85** with targets near lower support zones. Always combine technical signals with risk management to navigate volatility.
